Telex.summary: Okosmérők telepítése és nagyszabású hálózatfejlesztés is szerepel a tervek között.

Telex.summary: A kormány egy sor kérdésben döntött a szerdai kormányülésen.

Telex.title: Felgyújtott házak, betört ablakok, városszerte lángoló autók
Telex.summary: Egy szudáni menekült hétfő este a nyílt utcán próbált késsel brutálisan megölni egy férfit Belfastban. A történtek után kedd este elszabadult a káosz az északír városban. A durva bevándorlóellenes zavargások után már az áldozat családja intett nyugalomra. A kormányfő szerint felelősségre vonják az elkövetőket, és hagyni kell, hogy a rendőrség végezze a munkáját.

Telex.title: Gumicsizmában futott a betonon Székelyvarság polgármestere a medve elől
Telex.summary: Eredetileg egy csikót próbált elejteni az állat, később megkergette a kiérkező hatóságokat.

Telex.summary: Az Integritás Hatóság elnöke állítja, hogy semmilyen bűncselekményt nem követett el.

Telex.summary: A hatalmas eszköz kis híján ráesett egy operatőrre.

Telex.title: Soha nem látott csapatok, ismeretlen kihívások, extrém terhelés – indul a 48 csapatos foci-vb
Telex.summary: Szélsőséges körülmények közt kell focizniuk a csapatoknak, nem lesznek egyenlő feltételek a vb-n, ami megismerteti velünk a tizenhatoddöntő kifejezést. Végignéztük, mi várható, miért favorit Spanyolország, és hogy lett titkos esélyes az Amerikában egyszer már győztes Brazília. Irán és a vele hadban álló USA pedig simán össze is kerülhet a csoportkör után.

Telex.summary: Márpedig az amerikai alkotmány tiltja a kegyetlen és szokatlan büntetéseket, vagyis többé nem használhatják az államban ezt a kivégzési módot.

HVG.summary: A miniszterelnök összegezte a kormányülés legfontosabb döntéseit.

HVG.title: Közel 200 milliárd eurós uniós költségvetést javasol 2027-re az Európai Bizottság
HVG.summary: Mintegy 200 milliárd eurós kötelezettségvállalási összeggel terjesztette elő az Európai Bizottság a 2027-es uniós költségvetés tervezetét. A javaslat a jelenlegi, 2021–2027-es többéves pénzügyi keret utolsó éves büdzséje, amelynek célja, hogy biztosítsa az Európai Unió legfontosabb politikáinak finanszírozását az új, 2028–2034-es költségvetési ciklus elfogadásáig.

HVG.title: Hivatalos, sem Budapestnek, sem a megyei jogú városoknak nem kell befizetnie az iparűzésiadó-többletet idén
HVG.summary: A kormány nem is várta meg a társadalmi egyeztetés határidejét a rendelet kiadásával.

HVG.title: Románia azt kéri az EU-tól, hogy könnyítse meg a medvék kilövését
HVG.summary: Korábban is volt példa hasonlóra. Miután Ursula von der Leyen póniját ette meg egy szürkefarkas, azok lekerültek a szigorúan védett fajok listájáról. Ezúttal viszont nem pónik, emberek vannak veszélyben – érvelnek a kezdeményezők.

HVG.title: 930 embernek adták be az új fogyást segítő csodaszert, a hatása egyértelmű

HVG.title: Orbán kuruckodni akart vele, Semjén rossz reklámot csinált neki, de most megcsaphatja a rendszerváltás szele a Habsburg Ottó Alapítványt
HVG.summary: Megnéztük, mit csinál a Nemzeti Múzeumban őrzött Aranygyapjas rendi-lánccal megkínált Habsburg Ottó Alapítvány. Kiderült, hogy bár a születése Semjén Zsolthoz kötődik, de Prőhle Gergely vezetésével mára elismert tudományos műhellyé vált.

HVG.title: Történelmi mélypontra süllyedt az európaiak Egyesült Államokba vetett bizalma – állítja egy friss kutatás
HVG.summary: A kutatás készítői szerint egyértelműen Donald Trump miatt kezd elveszni a bizalom.

HVG.title: Reagált a halálos ítéletre az MCC
Súlyos mellékhatása lehet egy, az álmatlanság ellen is használt hatóanyagnak
HVG.summary: Ausztrál kutatók szerint a kvetiapin nevű hatóanyagot tartalmazó gyógyszert használók hiába nem érzik magukat fáradtnak, valójában sokat tompulnak az érzékeik. Magyarországon csak pszichiátriai betegek kaphatják meg az ilyen készítményeket, az Egyesült Államokban azonban altatóként is felírják az orvosok.

HVG.title: Óriási húsüzem égett órákig Nyírbátorban
HVG.summary: A tűzben senki nem sérült meg, 71 embert azonban ideiglenesen ki kellett telepíteni.

HVG.summary: A nőt a házaspár a földön altatta, és engedélyük nélkül a házat sem hagyhatta el.

BBC.title: 'I'll never get over watching my home burn': Belfast residents reel after night of unrest

BBC.summary: Police have been contacted with new information about the West Ham co-owner following a BBC Panorama and Times investigation.

BBC.title: Changing visa rules for care workers is wrong, says Rayner
BBC.summary: The former deputy prime minister says changing visa rules for migrants already living in the UK would be "un-British".

BBC.title: Vets advise ban on over the counter flea treatment for pets
BBC.summary: Pet owners have historically been advised they should treat cats and dogs as a preventative measure every month.

BBC.title: Stokes out of England squad, Root named captain
BBC.summary: Ben Stokes will miss England’s second Test against New Zealand at The Oval following an incident in a London nightclub, with Joe Root stepping up as interim captain.

BBC.title: Lacey Turner confirmed as first Strictly contestant
BBC.summary: The actress is best known for her role as Stacey Slater on EastEnders, the BBC One soap she joined in 2004.

BBC.title: Whale graveyard dating back five million years discovered
BBC.summary: The Indian Ocean site is "far beyond anything we had imagined", one researcher says.

BBC.title: Bill Gates says Epstein wanted personal relationship, but he 'never reciprocated'
BBC.summary: The Microsoft co-founder spent hours talking to lawmakers behind closed doors, where he also said Epstein used his marital infidelities to pressure him.

BBC.title: Ukraine says missiles hit military plant deep inside Russia
BBC.summary: Ukraine's military also says it has struck a Russian oil refinery and a "shadow fleet" oil tanker in the Black Sea.

BBC.title: Destruction shows torched homes and vehicles
BBC.summary: Houses, vehicles and a bus were set on fire during violent protests on Tuesday night after a knife attack in Belfast.

BBC.title: What the data does and doesn't tell us about asylum seekers in Northern Ireland
BBC.summary: Belfast police say a refugee charged with the attempted murder of a man on Monday initially entered the country from the Republic of Ireland.

BBC.title: Belfast knife attack disorder 'destabilising', says terror adviser
BBC.summary: Jonathan Hall KC tells the BBC it was "absolutely legitimate" to talk about immigration in relation to national security.

BBC.title: How a knife attack sparked a night of violence
BBC.summary: BBC Verify mapped some of the violent disorder that took place in Belfast and elsewhere in Northern Ireland.

BBC.title: What we know about the stabbing and violence
BBC.summary: Houses across the city have been set on fire following a knife attack earlier this week.

TechCrunch.title: Everyone wants a piece of Tesla’s battery business
TechCrunch.summary: Electricity demand from AI data centers is pushing everyone — including automakers like GM and Ford — into the energy storage business.

TechCrunch.title: Fresh off bond sale, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending continues
TechCrunch.summary: Companies are burning through exorbitant sums of money to keep pace in the AI arms race. Debt is climbing.

TechCrunch.title: North Koreans behind nearly half of US tech industry hacks, says CrowdStrike
TechCrunch.summary: North Korean hackers posing as remote IT workers and recruiters remain a major threat to U.S., European, and Asian companies, accounting for about half of all attacks over the past 12 months.

TechCrunch.title: Wing drone delivery might not be a novelty anymore
TechCrunch.summary: Wing is expanding into seven more U.S. cities through its partnership with Walmart.

TechCrunch.title: Netflix expands revamped mobile app across Asia and doubles down on kids’ gaming
TechCrunch.summary: The media giant is pushing to expand its mobile and gaming business.

TechCrunch.title: ‘AI-pilled’ firms spend $7,500 per employee each month on AI
TechCrunch.summary: The most AI-obsessed firms are spending roughly $7,500 monthly per employee on AI, per Ramp AI Index. That's not more than an engineer's salary — yet.

TechCrunch.title: The Indian government got cold feet on Starlink just before SpaceX’s IPO
TechCrunch.summary: Problems with Starlink's India expansion could challenge SpaceX's IPO growth story.

TechCrunch.title: How memory tools can make AI models worse
TechCrunch.summary: New research suggests that AI memory systems can degrade model performance and encourage sycophantic tendencies.

TechCrunch.title: Zest launches a restaurant discovery app powered by where people actually eat
TechCrunch.summary: Backed by Alexis Ohanian’s 776 and Kindred Ventures, Zest uses transaction data and AI to generate restaurant recommendations based on users’ real dining habits and the places they frequent.

TechCrunch.title: Cybersecurity researchers aren’t happy about the guardrails on Anthropic’s Fable
TechCrunch.summary: Cybersecurity researchers are complaining that Anthropic's new model Fable has guardrails that are too strict for any cybersecurity work.

TechCrunch.title: Why enterprise AI will be a major focus at VivaTech 2026
TechCrunch.summary: While Silicon Valley continues pushing aggressively into large language models and consumer-facing AI products, many European companies are focused on applying AI to complex systems already embedded into everyday life.

TechCrunch.title: Datadog veterans launch AI coding startup Niteshift on a bet against Big AI lock-in
TechCrunch.summary: AI coding agent startup Niteshift has raised a $7 million seed round from a who's who of angels. It's betting companies will want power over, not lock-in with model makers.

TechCrunch.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
TechCrunch.summary: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

TechCrunch.title: Pinterest bets on creators with Amazon Storefront integration
TechCrunch.summary: Pinterest is adding support for Amazon Storefronts, allowing creators to earn affiliate commissions more easily while showcasing their product recommendations in one place.

TechCrunch.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
TechCrunch.summary: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

Nature.title: Giant crustacean of the deep sea steals a trick from bacteria
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01832-x

Organisms called bathynomids boast a bacterial gene that helps them to regulate their metabolism in the cold depths.

Nature.title: Newly discovered whale graveyard dates back millions of years
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/d41586-026-01864-3

Submarine dives reveal complex deep-sea ecosystems living on whale remains — plus, a way to turn plant material into nylon.

Nature.title: Structural basis for chaperone-guided assembly of RNA-induced silencing complex
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10640-2

Structures of the AGO maturation complex reveal how chaperones and an RNA duplex drive assembly of the RNA-induced silencing complex.

Nature.title: SIRT7 regulates dosage compensation and safeguards the female X chromosome
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10645-x

SIRT7 safeguards X-chromosome integrity and dosage balance with autosomes.

Nature.title: A 5.3-million-year-old deep-sea whale necropolis in the Diamantina Zone
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10546-z

Researchers uncovered an enormous deep-sea accumulation of whale remains in the southeastern Indian Ocean, showing long-term, specialized ecosystems and an extensive fossil record that offers new insight into deep-ocean biodiversity and whale evolutionary history.

Nature.title: Whole-genome duplication shaped cell-type evolution in the vertebrate brain
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10629-x

Analyses of brain single-cell transcriptomes from human, mouse, lizard, lamprey and amphioxus reveal that duplicated genes (ohnologues) played a pivotal part in early vertebrate cell-type diversification.

Nature.title: In situ nanocrystal confinement for efficient blue perovskite LEDs
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10596-3

Efficient blue perovskite light-emitting diodes with an external quantum efficiency of 21.8% are achieved through in situ polymerization-driven nanocrystal confinement.

Nature.title: A prognostic human brain network for diffuse midline glioma
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10631-3

Tumour network mapping of diffuse midline glioma (DMG) defines a conserved and prognostically important brain network in children with DMG, consistent with the hypothesis that DMGs exploit otherwise healthy brain circuits to promote tumour growth.

Nature.title: Two-component exciton condensates in an electron–hole bilayer
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10636-y

Macroscopic quantum coherence arises in two-component exciton Bose–Einstein condensates within MoSe2/hBN/WSe2 electron–hole bilayers, exhibiting distinct spin–valley polarized phases, quantum phase transitions under magnetic fields and stable condensate behaviour up to approximately 1.8 K.

Nature.title: Mutation-dependent responses to sleep and exercise in clonal haematopoiesis
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10634-0

Sleep and exercise can slow clonal haematopoiesis and limit mutant cell-driven atherosclerosis.

Nature.title: Efficient and accurate neural-field reconstruction using resistive memory
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10646-w

A co-optimized AI hardware–software system using resistive-memory computing improves energy efficiency and parallelism for sparse signal reconstruction in imaging and three-dimensional vision applications.

Nature.title: Gene ancestries reveal diverse microbial associations during eukaryogenesis
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10639-9

Phylogenomic reconstruction of the proteome of the last eukaryotic common ancestor sheds light on the origin of eukaryotes, indicating an important role of horizontal transfer of genes from diverse bacterial and viral donors.

Nature.title: Molecular glue degraders of HuR suppress BRAF-mutant colorectal cancer
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10613-5

Molecular glue degraders of the RNA-binding protein HuR have therapeutic potential for BRAF-mutant cancers.

Nature.title: Light-induced quantum friction of carbon nanotubes in water
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10632-2

Near-infrared fluorescent carbon nanotubes exhibit light-induced quantum friction in water, in which exciton interactions slow nanoscale motion and enable optical control of diffusion and fluid dynamics.

Nature.title: Lignin to adipic acid in a high-yield chemical and biological redox process
Nature.summary:
Nature, Published online: 10 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s41586-026-10580-x

A chemical and biological redox process that resembles processes in petrochemical refining is used to convert lignin from poplar into a single, valuable bioproduct, adipic acid, in high yields.
